narrative:
DRIVER
USD leads D1 CSM at 100 with Fed hawkish PCE focus and US-Iran escalation driving the dominant bid, but the H4 regime has flipped risk-on medium with CHF fading 79 to 20 and EUR accelerating 6 to 64, flagging a live intraday reversal pressure. GBPUSD is the cleanest expression with D1 and H4 both buy at signal +4, AUDUSD confirms via AUDJPY correlation at 0.91 with H4 buy on both, and USDCHF H4 strong sell at -5 with 1212 H4 fading hard at 32 reinforces the USD short-term fade. Counter-narrative: USDJPY D1 momentum at 87 rising sharply while H4 fades to 34 means CADJPY at 0.65 correlation to USDJPY is also losing H4 traction, and any Iran headline spike reloads the D1 USD bid instantly.

MOMENTUM
Gaining: AUDJPY CMP 58 H4 rising sharply, AUDUSD CMP 51 H4 72 accelerating, GBPUSD CMP 47 H4 74 rising
Fading: EURUSD D1 23 fading, NZDUSD D1 29 fading

WATCH
PCE print surprises hawkish, USDCHF reclaims H4 momentum reversing the strong sell signal long.
Hormuz disruption headline escalates, CADJPY sells through H4 support as oil correlation hits CAD and JPY bids simultaneously.
ECB rate hike language firms, EURUSD H4 accelerating CSM at 64 breaks D1 sell resistance and triggers fresh EUR longs.

themes.theme: US-Iran escalation supports USD and risk-off sentiment
Fed hawkish expectations and PCE focus underpins USD
ECB rate hike expectations support Euro
Oil price volatility from Hormuz disruption concerns
AUD crowded longs facing event risk
Weaker US economic data tempers growth narrative
JPY bearish bias persists despite risk-off

key_observation: USD supported by dual drivers: geopolitical risk premium from US-Iran tensions and Fed hawkish positioning ahead of PCE data. Risk-off environment benefits safe-haven flows into USD. Equity markets marginally positive on Iran peace hopes, but FX positioning favors defensive currencies. Oil volatility from Hormuz disruption concerns creating cross-currency spillovers, particularly pressuring INR and AUD.
watch: US-Iran negotiations outcome and PCE inflation reading; Hormuz strait disruption timeline; ECB rate decision expectations; AUD technical levels around crowded long positions; NZD RBNZ guidance confirmation
